title: マヤのドキドキ☆肝試し！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's after curfew, and campus is silent. I'm heading
back to my office to grab something I forgot,
when...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh! Trainer! What a coinkydink! ♪
choice_data_list: What are you doing out so late?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm ghost-hunting!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
We watched a spooky show on TV, so I started
wondering if there were any ghosts on campus.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: O-obviously not, right? But she won't listen...
choice_data_list:
You know it's past curfew, right? You guys need
to get back to your dorm.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
R-r-r-r-right?! We've already looked everywhere,
so let's just go home!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What?! But there's still one more place! We
haven't checked Trainer's office yet!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
A long, long time ago, there was a racer who died
in an accident before she got her signature
racewear...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Her ghost appears each night in the office, crying
out, "Where's my signature racewear?!"

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Eeeeek!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: H-hey, stop... Y-you're just making things up!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You don't know that! Trainer, please take us to
your office!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun won't back down, so I end up
taking them back with me to my office.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Here, ghosty ghosty ghosty! Come out, come out,
wherever you are!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what are you doing?! What if something
actually comes out?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A wandering ghost who wants to try on her
signature racewear just once...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A wandering ghost who wants to try on her
signature racewear just once...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I mention that there's no doubt she dreamed of
racing on the turf in her signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I bet she really loved running...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
She must be in so much pain—lonely too! That's
why she comes here! I know I would!
choice_data_list: You want to resolve her unfinished business?
You want to resolve her unfinished business?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I know! I'll run for her sake!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Since she can't run anymore, I'll run in tons of
races for her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock, knock!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Something just knocked on the window!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! Let's go home already! I don't wanna get
possessed!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But it would be fun to be friends with a
ghost. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Right, Miss Ghost? ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
All right! Miss Ghost, I promise to do my best for
you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Almost as if she's picked up a tailwind, Mayano
Top Gun runs off with a spring in her step.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Aaah! It's the ghost!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Heeelp meee!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: R-right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We take off after Tokai Teio, but she's in such a
panic that we soon lose sight of her.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: She must be really scared of ghosts...
choice_data_list: I wonder where she ran off to.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Well, she probably didn't take any dark and
scary paths.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So the answer is simple! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Mayano Top Gun, who says she knows
where Tokai Teio went...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Target confirmed! Found ya, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
choice_data_list: I'm sorry for scaring you earlier.
I'm sorry for scaring you earlier.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She comes back to the dorms with us, but doesn't
say a word the whole way there.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Morning, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame we didn't see any ghosts last night,
huh? Got my hopes up for nothing.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: That's a good thing! I was so worried about you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You didn't come back to the dorm! I tried calling
but couldn't get a hold of you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? But you came back with us, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: No, I went back to the dorm by myself.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...Then who was the Teio that was with us last
night?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun and Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!
